reason: Manifest schema — verify the Signature field is populated correctly and canonical encoding is stable.
Auth conventions — verify /api/v1/signing-key is correctly unauthenticated and that 401/404 are used per the design (don't leak existence).
Route conventions — verify the new endpoint matches existing patterns.
Atomic write rules — state/hub.json, state/pull/, state/signing-key.json must follow these (temp file → fsync → rename → fsync parent).
Token handling posture — verify pull token storage in hub.json is consistent.
